patch.value: Dedupe flag-contracts.ts repetitive per-command blocks (9 internal clones, ~150 lines)

2026-07-04 code-quality sweep: src/sdk/cli-contracts/flag-contracts.ts (1615 LOC) has 9 internal jscpd clones at --min-tokens 70 (e.g. 683-698 vs 1127-1142, 945-963 vs 1047-1065, 1091-1107 vs 1204-1220) — repetitive per-command flag-table blocks. Extract a shared builder to remove ~150 lines, then consider ratcheting .jscpd.json minTokens 115 -> ~90. Cross-file pairs worth folding into the same pass: history-compact.ts:323-352 vs history-repair.ts:174-203 (chain re-anchor logic), create.ts:283 vs update.ts:226, list.ts:489 vs search.ts:707, normalize.ts:427 vs update-many.ts:788, test-all.ts:37 vs test.ts:171, extension.ts:321-334 vs types.ts:821-834.
flag-contracts.ts per-command duplication replaced by shared builders with contract output verified byte-identical by the contracts gate.

## Context
2026-07-04 code-quality sweep: src/sdk/cli-contracts/flag-contracts.ts (1615 LOC) contains 9 internal jscpd clones at --min-tokens 70 (e.g. 683-698 vs 1127-1142, 945-963 vs 1047-1065, 1091-1107 vs 1204-1220) — repetitive per-command flag-table blocks.

## Approach
Extract a shared per-command flag-block builder (~150 lines saved). The SDK contract surface must stay byte-identical — flag-contracts feeds contracts --full and the MCP schema; run `pnpm contracts:update` and diff to prove no drift. Cross-file clone pairs to fold into the same pass: history-compact.ts:323-352 vs history-repair.ts:174-203 (chain re-anchor), create.ts:283 vs update.ts:226, list.ts:489 vs search.ts:707 (coordinate with pm-jt3b's search split), normalize.ts:427 vs update-many.ts:788, test-all.ts:37 vs test.ts:171, extension.ts:321-334 vs types.ts:821-834. Then ratchet .jscpd.json minTokens 115 → ~90.

## Definition of done
jscpd clean at the ratcheted threshold; contracts output byte-identical; suppression/gate budgets unchanged or lower.
